title: Dabartinės lietuvių kalbos tekstyno lemuotas dažninis sąrašas

publication.access: The complete reviewed JSON dataset is available directly and is also selectable in the browser explorer.

description: The current CCLL lemma-frequency view, published as a reviewed browser-selectable dataset.

provenance.citation: Petkevičius, Mindaugas. 2025. CCLL Lemmatised Frequency Lists. Institute of Digital Resources and Interdisciplinary Research (SITTI) at Vytautas Magnus University. CLARIN-LT Repository. https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.11821/77.
